title: persea perseiphylla
intro: Persea perseiphylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, commonly known as the mountain avocado or Peruvian mountain avocado. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Persea perseiphylla include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
